  direction: 'up' | 'down';
}

export function NumberInputChevron({ direction, style, ...others }: ChevronProps) {
  return (
    <svg
      style={{
        width: 'var(--ni-chevron-size)',
        height: 'var(--ni-chevron-size)',
        transform: direction === 'up' ? 'rotate(180deg)' : undefined,
        ...style,
